description_long: This church features a white exterior with tall, pointed arched windows framed in gold, reminiscent of Gothic Revival architecture. The structure includes a prominent steeple with a circular window and decorative elements, as well as a bell tower integrated into the front facade. The roof is steeply pitched and covered in dark gray shingles, while the base of the building is accented with red trim. Wooden double doors serve as the main entrance, and several smaller architectural details, such as brick columns and circular window groupings, add visual interest. The overall design is both traditional and inviting, making it a recognizable landmark in an urban setting.
description: A white Gothic Revival-style church with pointed arched windows, a tall steeple, and a red-trimmed base. Features include a bell tower, wooden doors, and decorative window groupings.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the church with three tall arched windows, brick columns, and the sloped roof, with the steeple visible in the background.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible here, showcasing the main entrance with a wooden door, the bell tower, and the steeple with a circular window and cross detail.
description_view_2: This angle shows the rear and side, featuring a large wooden door, a set of three circular windows, and the continuation of the arched window motif.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the church is visible, with the plain wall and arched windows, and the steeple receding into the background.
